## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Who is affected and why does it matter?

## Proposal

Describe the change or capability you'd like to see. Include API sketches, UX notes,
or design references where helpful.

## Alternatives

What other approaches did you consider? Why is the proposal preferable?

## Additional context

Links to ADRs, design docs, related issues, prior art, or screenshots.
